message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing true
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #000000
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #000000
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6F2
  ActorBorderColor #000000
  ActorBackgroundColor #E6E6F2
  ArrowColor #000000
  ArrowThickness 2
  MessageAlign left
}

actor User as U
control RegistrationService as RS
participant RegistrationRepository as RR

U -> RS : createUser(name, pass)
activate RS
RS -> RR : save(User)
RR --> RS
RS --> U
deactivate RS
@enduml
